description.en: Attacks an enemy with a Heavy Strike.\nWith a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance, inflicts an undispellable <color=#28d9ed>Curse</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵を強撃で攻撃。\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターン持続の解除不可<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を付与。
description.kr:
적을 강격으로 공격합니다. 
대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 저주를 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
description.zh: 用强击攻击敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>概率施加持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合的不可驱散<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies with a Heavy Strike.\nFor each target hit, increases own Priority by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color>, and with a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance, inflicts an undispellable <color=#28d9ed>Curse</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵全体を強撃で攻撃。\n命中した対象1体ごとに自分の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>増加。さらに<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターン持続の解除不可<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を付与。
description.kr:
적 전체를 강격으로 공격합니다. 
피해를 준 대상마다 자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 증가하고, 대상 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 저주를 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
description.zh: 用强击攻击全体敌人。\n每命中一个目标,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>+<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>概率施加持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合的不可驱散<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>。

name.jp: 一切有為法 如夢幻泡影
name.zh: 一切有为法,如梦幻泡影

description.en:
Attacks all enemies with Heavy Strike and recovers Chain Points by <color=#28d9ed>15</color>.
After attacking, detonates all Cursed stacks on the target and reduces Action Points by <color=#28d9ed>80</color>.
description.jp:
敵全体に強撃でダメージを与え、CPを<color=#28d9ed>15</color>獲得する。
攻撃後、対象の呪いをすべて破裂させ、APを<color=#28d9ed>80</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
적 전체를 강격으로 공격하고 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>15</color> 회복합니다.
공격 후 대상의 저주를 모두 폭발시키고, AP를 <color=#28d9ed>80</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
强击全体敌人,恢复<color=#28d9ed>15</color>的CP。
攻击后,使目标受到的所有诅咒效果爆炸,AP减少<color=#28d9ed>80</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> of Max Health or lower. 

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: Attacks all enemies.
After becoming Enraged, permanently increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color>.
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:敵全体にダメージを与える。狂暴化後、永続的に
攻撃力<color=#28d9ed>と</color>スピード<color=#28d9ed>がUPし、</color>受けるダメージ<color=#28d9ed>がDOWNする</color>。
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다. 

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> : 적 전체를 공격합니다. 
광폭화 이후 영구적으로 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가하고 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>가 감소합니다.
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>:攻击全体敌人。
狂暴化后永久获得<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,并使<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低。
